---
title: "Home"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/serena-128
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/serena-e-606aa122a/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:serena.emedeke2@mail.dcu.ie
---

## Welcome

Hi, I’m **Serena Emedeke** — a student developing practical skills in **Python, data analysis, Quarto, Git, and digital presentation**.

::: {.callout-note}
This portfolio demonstrates my ability to **analyse data, develop structured projects, and present technical work in a clear and professional format**.
:::

## What I Bring

- Strong foundation in **Python and data analysis**  
- Ability to communicate technical results clearly  
- Experience using **Git and version control**  
- A structured and professional approach to project work  

## Highlights

::: {.section-card}
### 📊 Technical Projects
Python-based projects demonstrating data analysis, structured datasets, and visualisation techniques.
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 🧠 Reflection and Growth
Critical reflection on challenges faced, skills developed, and future learning goals.
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 📄 Professional Profile
A complete overview of my background, skills, CV, and contact details.
:::

## Featured Projects

::: {.section-card}
### 📊 Student Performance Analysis
A Python project analysing the relationship between study time and academic performance.

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib  

[View Project](projects/list/project-1.html)
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 💰 Monthly Budget Analysis
A Python project analysing income and expenses to identify spending patterns and support financial decision-making.

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib  

[View Project](projects/list/project-2.html)
:::
